name: parallel_investigate
description: Spawn N scout sub-agents in parallel (one per area), then synthesize the reports into one executive summary.

synth_prompt.default: Synthesize the following N scout reports into one executive summary with key findings and open questions.

steps.description: Fan out one sub-agent per area. Each runs in parallel.
steps.user_prompt: Investigate the '${area}' surface of the codebase. Produce a one-page summary.

steps.description: Fuse all scout reports into one exec summary (depends on investigate having spawned).
